# Klienta — site mirror

GitHub Pages mirror for the Klienta marketing surface and trust docs.

- Mirror URL: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/klienta/
- Canonical product page: https://byteworthy.io/boilerplates/klienta
- Boilerplates hub: https://byteworthy.io/boilerplates
- Services: https://byteworthy.io/services
- Contact: https://byteworthy.io/contact

## Repository links

- Klienta (this repo, public trust surface): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta
- Klienta source: private, license-gated (provisioned after purchase)
- Sovra (open-source sibling): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra
- Clynova (HIPAA-grade sibling boilerplate): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/clynova

## Trust docs

- EULA: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta/blob/main/EULA.md
- Terms: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta/blob/main/TERMS.md
- Security: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta/blob/main/SECURITY.md
- Sales flow: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta/blob/main/SALES-FLOW.md
